## Cathie Wood Buys SpaceX Into 38% Drawdown, Calls It Potentially Most Important Company in History

A named high-profile buy at a 38% drawdown sets a public sentiment anchor for SPCX and the space economy theme. For a tech PM, this signals where conviction growth investors are finding asymmetric setups, and reinforces the space infrastructure thesis as a long-duration AI-adjacent narrative.

- Cathie Wood (ARK) is actively buying SpaceX (SPCX) shares amid a decline of approximately 38% from recent highs.
- Wood publicly characterized SpaceX as potentially the most important company in global history.
- Coverage spans 24/7 Wall St. and Fox Business, giving the endorsement wide mainstream media pickup.
- Classified at high confidence given the named investor, named stock, and explicit dip percentage.
